privileged_info_summary: Task processes three synthetic HL7 v2.3 sample messages with mock patient data (names: JOHNSON, MARTINEZ, THOMPSON; SSNs: 987654321, 123456789, 456789012; addresses: 456 OAK AVENUE, 789 PINE STREET, 321 MAPLE DRIVE). PHI is located in PID segment fields: PID-5 (Patient Name), PID-11 (Address), PID-13 (Home Phone), and PID-19 (SSN). All three input files are generated with synthetic data by setup_task.sh. Task requires creating a channel named PHI_Deidentification_Pipeline that replaces PID-5 with ANONYMOUS^PATIENT and PID-11 with REMOVED^^REMOVED^XX^00000, and removes PID-13 and PID-19 values.
